input: graph with product nodes, edges from sales transactions, and product features (indications, ingredients, adverse effects) as node attributes
output: ranked list of cross-sell product recommendations
loss: not specified (likely a ranking loss, but not stated in abstract)
key_idea: incorporate both cross-sales information and pharmaceutical product properties as node features in a GCN, with modified sampling to mitigate popularity bias
datasets: real-world pharmacy sales data (700k articles, 100M transactions)
metrics: not specified (abstract mentions better results than statistics-based approach but no explicit metrics)
